reviews.comment:
La vi muy desprovista, falta de limpieza, desprolija y personal poco atento. Una pena, siempre fue una excelente estación.

(Translated by Google)
I found it very bare, unclean, untidy, and with inattentive staff. A shame; it's always been an excellent station.

reviews.comment:
son un desastre no se  los recomiendo prefiero ir al la estación Dapsa que tienen mejor trato la gente del mini mercado o su jefe no respetan al cliente hoy le encargas torta frita siempre se les pago nunca les deje de encargar y ahora hay que pagar por anticipado yo no me ensucio por tan poco dinero pero si no les interesa perder un cliente a mi tampoco son  yo les recomiendo la estación Dapsa "NO TIENEN TANTOS PREJUICIOS COMO ESTA GENTE" !!!!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
They're a disaster, I don't recommend them. I prefer going to the Dapsa station where they treat customers much better. The people at the mini-market, or their manager, don't respect the customer. Today I ordered fried cakes, I always paid them, I never missed an order, and now I have to pay in advance. I'm not going to get my hands dirty for so little money, but if they don't care about losing a customer, neither do I. I recommend the Dapsa station. "THEY DON'T HAVE AS MANY PREJUDICES AS THESE PEOPLE!"
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMteFpLWGlnRRAB
